Operation 'getNations' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is vague about what constitutes the returned data and lacks context about the reference data's purpose. Enhanced summary to clarify the filtering use case. Improved description to specify return format, data structure, and how this reference data integrates with search operations for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve list of nations for use in search criteria.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of nations available in the NatureServe database for use as search criteria filters. Returns a collection of nation objects containing nation codes and names. This reference data is used to filter species and ecosystem search results by geographic location.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what constitutes the returned data and lacks context about the reference data's purpose. Enhanced summary to clarify the filtering use case. Improved description to specify return format, data structure, and how this reference data integrates with search operations for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getSubnations' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks clarity about the nation parameter's purpose and what the response contains. Enhanced summary to clarify geographic filtering intent. Improved description to explain the optional nation parameter for filtering, specify return data structure, and contextualize how subnations integrate with search operations for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve list of subnations (states/provinces) for use in search criteria.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of subnations (states/provinces) available in the NatureServe database for use as search criteria filters. Accepts an optional nation parameter to filter subnations by parent nation. Returns a collection of subnation objects containing subnation codes and names. This reference data is used to filter species and ecosystem search results by geographic subdivision.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about the nation parameter's purpose and what the response contains. Enhanced summary to clarify geographic filtering intent. Improved description to explain the optional nation parameter for filtering, specify return data structure, and contextualize how subnations integrate with search operations for improved AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getInformalTaxonomy' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too vague about what informal taxonomy represents and lacks context about its purpose and return format. Enhanced summary to clarify it's reference data. Improved description to explain what informal taxonomy is, specify return data structure, and clarify how it differs from formal taxonomy for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves informal taxonomy categories used to classify organisms in the NatureServe database. Returns a collection of taxonomy category objects containing category codes and names. This reference data is used to filter species search results by informal taxonomic groupings (such as common organism classifications) rather than formal scientific taxonomy.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what informal taxonomy represents and lacks context about its purpose and return format. Enhanced summary to clarify it's reference data. Improved description to explain what informal taxonomy is, specify return data structure, and clarify how it differs from formal taxonomy for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'searchSpecies' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what is returned and pagination support. Enhanced summary to indicate multi-criteria capability. Expanded description to specify return format (paginated results), what data is included in results (conservation rankings, basic information), and pagination support for better AI agent understanding of result handling.

data.current_description: Search for species using various criteria including text, status, location, and taxonomy filters.
data.description_suggestion: Search for species records using various criteria including text search, conservation status, geographic location, and taxonomy filters. Returns paginated search results containing matching species with their conservation rankings and basic information. Supports filtering by multiple criteria simultaneously.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what is returned and pagination support. Enhanced summary to indicate multi-criteria capability. Expanded description to specify return format (paginated results), what data is included in results (conservation rankings, basic information), and pagination support for better AI agent understanding of result handling.

data.current_description: Search for ecosystem records with hierarchy filters.
data.summary_suggestion: Search ecosystems by hierarchy and criteria
data.description_suggestion: Search for ecosystem records using hierarchy filters and other search criteria. Supports filtering by ecosystem type, geographic location, and conservation status.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too vague and doesn't indicate what filtering is available. Expanded description to clarify available filter types, return format (paginated results), and what ecosystem data is included in responses for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'combinedSearch' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks specificity about the combined nature of results. Description is too brief and doesn't explain result structure or what data is returned. Enhanced summary to clarify simultaneous searching capability. Expanded description to explain that results are returned in separate sets, what data is included for each entity type, pagination support, and which criteria apply to both species and ecosystems for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Search for both species and ecosystem records simultaneously using unified search criteria. Returns paginated results containing matching species and ecosystems in separate result sets, each with their respective conservation status and classification information. Allows filtering by shared criteria such as geographic location and text search across both entity types.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the combined nature of results. Description is too brief and doesn't explain result structure or what data is returned. Enhanced summary to clarify simultaneous searching capability. Expanded description to explain that results are returned in separate sets, what data is included for each entity type, pagination support, and which criteria apply to both species and ecosystems for improved AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getTaxonByAlternateKey' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what constitutes an 'alternate key' and what data is returned. Enhanced description to clarify what alternate key types are supported (scientific name, common name examples), explain that it returns the same data as the primary lookup method, and indicate the use case for when this operation is appropriate for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve taxon information using an alternate key.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed taxon information using an alternate key identifier (such as scientific name or common name). Returns the same comprehensive taxon data as the Element Global UID lookup, including classification, conservation status, and subnational distribution information. Useful when the Element Global UID is not available.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what constitutes an 'alternate key' and what data is returned. Enhanced description to clarify what alternate key types are supported (scientific name, common name examples), explain that it returns the same data as the primary lookup method, and indicate the use case for when this operation is appropriate for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getEcosystemHierarchy' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too vague about what the hierarchy contains and how it's structured. Enhanced description to explain that this is reference data for the entire NatureServe ecosystem classification system, clarify the hierarchical structure (broad to specific), and indicate practical use cases (filter validation, understanding relationships) to help AI agents determine when this operation is needed.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the complete ecosystem classification hierarchy used by NatureServe for organizing and categorizing ecosystem types. Returns a hierarchical structure showing ecosystem classifications from broad categories to specific types, enabling understanding of ecosystem relationships and taxonomy. This reference data is useful for validating ecosystem search filters and understanding ecosystem classification structure.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too vague about what the hierarchy contains and how it's structured. Enhanced description to explain that this is reference data for the entire NatureServe ecosystem classification system, clarify the hierarchical structure (broad to specific), and indicate practical use cases (filter validation, understanding relationships) to help AI agents determine when this operation is needed.

message: Operation 'exportSearchResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate. data.current_description: Export search results in a specified format.
data.description_suggestion: Export search results from species and ecosystem searches in a specified format. Accepts search criteria and format specification (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) as input. Returns the formatted export file containing all matching records with their associated conservation status, classification, and geographic data. Supports pagination for large result sets. Note: Export operations may take longer for large datasets.
